feature_list.test_description: Verify direct support for 100 Kbps normal-mode I2C operation.
test_steps: Configure the interface for 100 Kbps normal-mode operation.
Apply SCL and SDA activity consistent with normal-mode timing.
expected_results: The interface supports 100 Kbps normal-mode operation.
SCL and SDA operation is consistent with the configured normal-mode speed.
feature_list.requirement_description: The core can directly support 100 Kbps normal-mode I2C operation, where implemented.
feature_list.requirement_text:
The interface defines 3 transmission speeds:
- Normal: 100Kbps
Only 100Kbps and 400Kbps modes are supported directly.

feature_list.test_description: Verify direct support for 400 Kbps fast-mode I2C operation.
test_steps: Configure the interface for 400 Kbps fast-mode operation.
Apply SCL and SDA activity consistent with fast-mode timing.
expected_results: The interface supports 400 Kbps fast-mode operation.
SCL and SDA operation is consistent with the configured fast-mode speed.
feature_list.requirement_description: The core can support 400 Kbps fast-mode I2C operation, where correct hardware is included.
feature_list.requirement_text:
The interface defines 3 transmission speeds:
- Fast: 400Kbps
Only 100Kbps and 400Kbps modes are supported directly.

feature_list.test_description: Verify the core implements a WISHBONE RevB.3 compliant WISHBONE Classic interface.
test_steps: Connect the core to a WISHBONE Classic RevB.3-compatible test environment.
Perform a basic bus access using the WISHBONE interface signals.
expected_results: The interface operates as a WISHBONE RevB.3 compliant WISHBONE Classic interface.
The observed bus behavior is consistent with the interface specification.
feature_list.requirement_description: The core shall implement a WISHBONE RevB.3 compliant WISHBONE Classic interface.
feature_list.requirement_text: The core features a WISHBONE RevB.3 compliant WISHBONE Classic interface.

feature_list.test_description: Verify that each WISHBONE access takes two clock cycles.
test_steps: Initiate a WISHBONE access with wb_cyc_i and wb_stb_i asserted.
Measure the number of wb_clk_i cycles until wb_ack_o is asserted.
expected_results: The access completes in two clock cycles.
wb_ack_o is asserted after two wb_clk_i cycles.
feature_list.requirement_description: Each WISHBONE access must take two clock cycles.

feature_list.test_description: Verify asynchronous reset behavior when ARST_LVL is configured as active high.
test_steps: Assert arst_i high and observe core reset behavior.
expected_results: The asynchronous reset is recognized when arst_i is high.
The core enters reset state as configured.
feature_list.requirement_description: The asynchronous reset level is configurable as active high or active low.
feature_list.requirement_text: The asynchronous reset level can be set to either active high (1’b1) or active low (1’b0)

feature_list.test_description: Verify asynchronous reset behavior when ARST_LVL is configured as active low.
test_steps: Assert arst_i low and observe core reset behavior.
expected_results: The asynchronous reset is recognized when arst_i is low.
The core enters reset state as configured.
feature_list.requirement_description: The asynchronous reset level is configurable as active high or active low.
feature_list.requirement_text: The asynchronous reset level can be set to either active high (1’b1) or active low (1’b0)

feature_list.test_description: Verify SCL pad input, output, and output-enable signals are exposed for external open-drain bus connection.
test_steps: Inspect the interface for scl_pad_i, scl_pad_o, and scl_pad_oe.
Apply an external SCL connection scenario using the exposed signals.
expected_results: The SCL pad input, output, and output-enable signals are present.
The SCL interface supports external open-drain bus connection.
feature_list.requirement_description: The core must expose SCL and SDA pad input, output, and output-enable signals for external open-drain bus connection.
feature_list.requirement_text:
scl_pad_i | 1 | Input | Serial Clock line input
scl_pad_o | 1 | Output | Serial Clock line output
scl_pad_oe | 1 | Output | Serial Clock line output enable
sda_pad_i | 1 | Input | Serial Data line input
sda_pad_o | 1 | Output | Serial Data line output
sda_pad_oe | 1 | Output | Serial Data line output enable

feature_list.test_description: Verify SDA pad input, output, and output-enable signals are exposed for external open-drain bus connection.
test_steps: Inspect the interface for sda_pad_i, sda_pad_o, and sda_pad_oe.
Apply an external SDA connection scenario using the exposed signals.
expected_results: The SDA pad input, output, and output-enable signals are present.
The SDA interface supports external open-drain bus connection.
feature_list.requirement_description: The core must expose SCL and SDA pad input, output, and output-enable signals for external open-drain bus connection.
feature_list.requirement_text:
scl_pad_i | 1 | Input | Serial Clock line input
scl_pad_o | 1 | Output | Serial Clock line output
scl_pad_oe | 1 | Output | Serial Clock line output enable
sda_pad_i | 1 | Input | Serial Data line input
sda_pad_o | 1 | Output | Serial Data line output
sda_pad_oe | 1 | Output | Serial Data line output enable
